project_name: The DukeBox of London - London Legend Edition

theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The DukeBox of London is a premium AI-native electronic music app for professional DJs embedded in UK rave culture. It requires high-energy, dark-mode cyberpunk aesthetics (Archetype 7) combined with the precision and tactile functionality of analog audio hardware (Archetype 4).

skins.Obsidian Matte: black/crimson (Matte black surfaces, dark red accents)
skins.Carbon: CRT green monochrome (Terminal black, neon green phosphor text and borders)

display.usage: Display headlines, Phase numbers, Hero text (Mimics Druk Wide Heavy)

ui.usage: General UI, buttons, tabs, navigation (Mimics SF Pro Rounded)

editorial.usage: Editorial text, descriptive paragraphs, genre lore (Mimics Neue Montreal)

data.usage: Technical data, BPM, timestamps, audio metadata (Mimics SF Mono)

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Dense, precise, highly structured but with asymmetrical accentuation.

grids.genre_explorer: Bento Grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6) with gap-4. Mixed spans for popular genres.
grids.dashboard: Asymmetrical layout. Main Phase Selector dial takes col-span-full md:col-span-8, side stats take col-span-4.

spacing_and_layout.containers: All functional containers (visualizers, history cards) must have generous internal padding (p-6) with crisp 1px borders.

genre_cards.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] hover:border-electric-cyan/50 transition-colors

knobs_and_dials.classes: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-b from-[#1a1a24] to-[#0A0A0F] border border-[#2a2a35] shadow-[0_4px_10px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8),inset_0_1px_2px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard snaps for hardware buttons. Soft neon glows (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,230,242,0.5)]) for digital links.
motion_and_interactions.ai_active: Pulsing animation using hyper-magenta and electric-cyan. CRT scanline flicker on the visualizer.
motion_and_interactions.phase_selector: Smooth rotation with Framer Motion, snapping to 4 distinct phases with haptic-like visual feedback.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast active states.

components_and_libraries.ui_framework: Shadcn UI (heavily customized for dark mode hardware aesthetic)
components_and_libraries.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Bold weights for a hardware-etched look)
components_and_libraries.charts: recharts (for Vault timelines / Vibe Evolution Chart)

hero_warehouse_bg.description: Dark moody warehouse rave with cyan and magenta lasers. Use as a low-opacity background for the Dashboard.

rotary_knob_texture.description: High-end brushed aluminum rotary knob. Use as the central Phase Selector dial visual or texture overlay.

genre_abstract_art.description: Fluid glowing glass shapes. Use as thumbnails or hover backgrounds in the Genre Explorer.

crt_waveform.description: Analog CRT monitor displaying waveforms. Use in the Now Playing visualizer or History/Vault thumbnails.

dj_mixer_hardware.description: Close-up of a DJ mixer in low light. Use for the Settings page background or Skin Switcher preview.

london_underground_sign.description: Neon underground sign. Use for the 'London Legend Edition' branding elements or welcome screen.

specific_screen_instructions.Global_Nav: Sticky top bar using 'Crystal Glass' over dark mode (bg-[#0A0A0F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl). Must include 'London Legend Edition' badge in SF Mono.
specific_screen_instructions.Dashboard_Phase_Selector: Central feature. A massive, tactile rotary wheel. Background is 'cyber-peak-bg'. Use the rotary_knob_texture. Around the dial, show 4 phases (1: Peak Techno, 2: Club Tech, 3: Sunrise, 4: Ambient). The dial dictates the UI accent color.
specific_screen_instructions.Genre_Explorer: Glassmorphic bento grid. Each genre card uses 'surface_glass' with subtle 'border_highlight' on hover. Text uses 'ui' font. Use 'genre_abstract_art' as a subtle background pattern for featured genres.
specific_screen_instructions.Now_Playing: Hardware-inspired 'Control Room' interface. Needs bass/treble knobs (rendered via CSS with metallic gradients), a central 'crt_waveform' visualizer, and strict 1px grid borders.
specific_screen_instructions.History_Vault: Timeline view using 'SF Mono' for timestamps. Show waveform thumbnails. Use muted colors (e.g., 'text_secondary') for past tracks, highlighting the currently playing track in 'hyper-magenta'.
specific_screen_instructions.Settings_and_Skin_Switcher: A tactile control panel. The skin switcher should be a row of hardware-style toggle buttons or a heavy dropdown, applying different CSS variables based on the skin selected.

testing_requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, sliders, genre cards, phase dial) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='phase-selector-dial').
